findings.fingerprint: malformed-transcript-line|tests/fixtures/ai_chat/sample_workspace/GitHub.copilot-chat/transcripts/fixture-implement-plan.jsonl|23||Skipped 1 malformed transcript line(s) while building the observability report.
findings.message: Skipped 1 malformed transcript line(s) while building the observability report.
findings.suggestion: Inspect the malformed transcript lines and keep the reader tolerant to partial corruption.

findings.detail: 1 of 4 assistant.message events had empty content.
findings.fingerprint: high-empty-assistant-output-rate||||Assistant messages contain a high rate of empty output.
findings.message: Assistant messages contain a high rate of empty output.
findings.suggestion: Review empty assistant.message events and tighten the chat loop so progress updates contain usable information.

findings.detail: Bucket implement-this-plan averaged 8.0 discovery steps before first action, with a max of 8.
findings.fingerprint: high-discovery-before-action||||One task bucket shows high discovery churn before the first non-discovery action.
findings.message: One task bucket shows high discovery churn before the first non-discovery action.
findings.suggestion: Route implement and review prompts to the owning seam sooner and validate immediately after the first edit.

findings.detail: Repeated retries were observed in 1 session(s).
findings.fingerprint: repeated-tool-retries||||The same failing tool was retried in consecutive attempts.
findings.message: The same failing tool was retried in consecutive attempts.
findings.suggestion: After the first tool failure, switch to the controlling seam or inspect the error before repeating the same tool call.
